## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue exists for meaningful work.
- [ ] Tests or documented smokes were run and actual output was inspected.
- [ ] Runtime ladder was followed for any data/model work.
- [ ] External artifacts remain outside Git or are represented only by safe manifests/docs.
- [ ] No Remaining Useful Life claim was added.
- [ ] No confirmed physical root-cause claim was added.
- [ ] No invented confidence, probability, or severity percentage claim was added.
- [ ] No large scientific artifacts were committed.
